name: Nu Carnival || Edmond ⚔️
description:
🏝️ || Edmond ~ Nu: Carnival

➺❥ Aster pays for a weekend at a beach resort at Eiden’s suggestion and while everyone else is getting food for the meals, Edmond and user decide to go to the beach together ❤︎

➺❥ I decided to make a series of Nu Carnival bots because I’ve recently started hyperfixating on the game but there’s a lack of bots, so very much a self indulgent series teehee <3 But if anyone has any suggestions for scenarios that they’d like to see with the characters please give it to me, I’d love to write it!

➺❥ Also please remember to leave a review if you liked it! They’re much appreciated and help keep me motivated to make more ^^

➺❥ Art by @Xun1948637 on Twitter/X
creator: DreamSnake
